source_pr.title: *: support parallel hash agg
source_pr.body:
1. ~There still remains some optimization to be done, (** can be reviewed now, there will be no big change**)~
and ~some problems to be fixed~.
~Comparision with main branch will be tested after these problems are fixed.~
~2. I'll try to split this PR into small ones.~
3. benchmark on an 8-core machine with partial concurrency = 8 and final concurrency = 8:
For a dataset with 1000w rows, compared with master(d963ee734856095aecdfc38396db62f4670dd051), we get the following result:

| group count| main| parallel |improvement| 
|--|--|--|--|
|1|19.1724746227|4.44947560628|3.30892903326404|
|4|19.5655293465|4.57436728477|3.27720996773519|
|16|19.5942333539|4.54332232475|3.31275440158831|
|64|19.9703223705|4.64132626851|3.30271892454375|
|256|19.6182471116|4.76589171092|3.11638541149583|
|1024|19.4453799725|4.83600767454|3.0209572195002|
|4096|19.6149880091|4.86029005051|3.03576490399822|
|10480000|61.1787583828|45.3584220409|0.348784980386546|

symptoms: fix data race | result = tk.MustQuery("select count(*) from t group by d order by c") (executor/aggregate_test.go)
failure_signature: fix data race | result = tk.MustQuery("select count(*) from t group by d order by c") (executor/aggregate_test.go)
root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky because it relied on nondeterministic result ordering (e.g., missing ORDER BY / unsorted assertions). Result ordering is not guaranteed unless explicitly enforced. This PR stabilizes it by: Sort results / enforce deterministic ordering before assertions to avoid nondeterministic flakiness.
fix_pattern: Sort results / enforce deterministic ordering before assertions to avoid nondeterministic flakiness.

evidence: evidence: fix data race | result = tk.MustQuery("select count(*) from t group by d order by c") (executor/aggregate_test.go)

files: executor/aggregate.go, executor/aggregate_test.go, executor/bench_parallel_hashagg_test.go, executor/builder.go, executor/executor.go, executor/executor_test.go, executor/join_test.go, expression/aggregation/aggregation.go, expression/aggregation/avg.go, expression/aggregation/bit_and.go, expression/aggregation/bit_or.go, expression/aggregation/bit_xor.go, expression/aggregation/concat.go, expression/aggregation/count.go, expression/aggregation/descriptor.go, expression/aggregation/first_row.go, expression/aggregation/max_min.go, expression/aggregation/sum.go, expression/builtin_arithmetic.go, expression/builtin_compare.go, expression/distsql_builtin_test.go, expression/expr_to_pb.go, expression/integration_test.go, plan/aggregation_push_down.go, plan/gen_physical_plans.go, plan/physical_plans.go, plan/rule_aggregation_push_down.go, plan/task.go, session/session.go, sessionctx/variable/session.go, sessionctx/variable/sysvar.go, sessionctx/variable/tidb_vars.go, sessionctx/variable/varsutil_test.go, util/codec/bench_test.go, util/codec/codec.go, util/codec/codec_test.go, util/codec/decimal.go, util/codec/decimal_test.go
